title: Diamante's Cruelty Returns
description: Pages 13–14 focus on diamante's cruelty returns, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as kyros faces Diamante in the flower field, defending Rebecca and settling Dressrosa's deepest family wound.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch Stitch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You and all your friends are in need of some real intimate time together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What the- Zamasu? What is this!? Eh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Just in the Nick of Time! By a thread!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: He finished off Giolla before she could revive anyone!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Princess, you're a bit... Girthier since we last saw each other...

summary: Diamante's Cruelty Returns advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
